DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-05-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT NANCY LOFDAHL'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Brian F. Connors, Esq. of Law Office of Brian F. Connors 896-6000 for pltf & opposing party; Paul H. Melbostad, Esq. & Alan N. Herzfeld, Esq. of Goldstein, Gellman, Melbostad & Harris LLP 673-5600 for deft Donald Crabtree; Nancy E. Lofdahl, Esq. 314-7088 deft in propria persona.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - overruled with ten days to answer. The seventh cause of action as alleged in the complaint is not barred by the litigation privilege. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-05-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT ANTHONY SAAB'S JOINDER IN THE DEMURRERS OF DEFENDANTS DONALD CRABTREE AND NANCY LOFDAHL.

APPEARANCES: Brian F. Connors, Esq. of Law Office of Brian F. Connors 896-6000 for pltf & opposing party; Paul H. Melbostad, Esq. & Alan N. Herzfeld, Esq. of Goldstein, Gellman, Melbostad & Harris LLP 673-5600 for deft Donald Crabtree; Nancy E. Lofdahl, Esq. 314-7088 deft in propria persona.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - overruled with ten days to answer. Because the demurrers of Mr. Crabtree and Ms. Lofdahl are overruled, so is Mr. Saab's demurrer. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-05-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT DOROTHY MARIE SHURTLEFF'S JOINDER IN THE DEMURRERS OF DEFENDANTS DONALD CRABTREE AND NANCY LOFDAHL.

APPEARANCES: Brian F. Connors, Esq. of Law Office of Brian F. Connors 896-6000 for pltf & opposing party; Paul H. Melbostad, Esq. & Alan N. Herzfeld, Esq. of Goldstein, Gellman, Melbostad & Harris LLP 673-5600 for deft Donald Crabtree; Nancy E. Lofdahl, Esq. 314-7088 deft in propria persona.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - overruled with ten days to answer. Because the demurrers of Mr. Crabtree and Ms. Lofdahl are overruled, so is Ms. Shurtleff's demurrer. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-05-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT DONALD CRABTREE'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT FOR SLANDER; INVASION OF PRIVACY; TRESPASS; CONVERSION; AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS.

APPEARANCES: Brian F. Connors, Esq. of Law Office of Brian F. Connors 896-6000 for pltf & opposing party; Paul H. Melbostad, Esq. & Alan N. Herzfeld, Esq. of Goldstein, Gellman, Melbostad & Harris LLP 673-5600 for deft Donald Crabtree; Nancy E. Lofdahl, Esq. 314-7088 deft in propria persona.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - overruled with ten days to answer. None of the cause of action as alleged in the complaint against Mr. Crabtree are barred by the litigation privilege. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
